title: Future Simple (will)
explanation_en: Use will to talk about something in the future. Step 1: Find the future-time signal. Step 2: Put will before the action word. Keep the action word in its base form. Example: I will visit Grandma tomorrow.
explanation_zh: 未來簡單式用來表示將來的事情。第一步：找出表示未來時間的提示詞。第二步：在動詞前加 will，動詞使用原形。例如：I will visit Grandma tomorrow.（我明天會探望祖母。）

spelling_rules.rule: Use the base verb after will.
Use will not for a negative sentence.
Use won't as the short form of will not.
Put will before the subject in a question.

examples.english: I will finish my homework later.
examples.reason_cn: later 表示稍後會發生的事情。

examples.english: Mum will cook noodles tomorrow.
examples.reason_cn: tomorrow 表示明天會發生的事情。

examples.english: We will play football after school.
examples.reason_cn: after school 表示稍後的時間。

examples.english: Dad will wash the car tomorrow morning.
examples.reason_cn: tomorrow morning 表示明天早上會發生的事情。

examples.english: Amy will bring her library book tomorrow.
examples.chinese: Amy 明天會帶圖書館的書回來。
examples.reason_cn: will 後面使用動詞原形 bring。

examples.english: Our class will visit the museum next week.
examples.chinese: 我們班下星期會參觀博物館。
examples.reason_cn: next week 表示下星期會發生的事情。

examples.english: My sister will start swimming lessons next month.
examples.chinese: 我姐姐下個月會開始上游泳課。
examples.reason_cn: next month 表示下個月會發生的事情。

examples.english: The bus will arrive soon.
examples.reason_cn: soon 表示事情很快會發生。

examples.english: I will tidy my desk later.
examples.reason_cn: will 後面使用動詞原形 tidy。

examples.english: They will watch a film tomorrow evening.
examples.chinese: 他們明晚會看一齣電影。
examples.reason_cn: tomorrow evening 表示明晚會發生的事情。

examples.english: Ben will practise the piano tomorrow.
examples.reason_cn: will 後面使用動詞原形 practise。

examples.english: We will plant flowers next weekend.
examples.reason_cn: next weekend 表示下週末會發生的事情。

examples.english: The teacher will check our work later.
examples.chinese: 老師稍後會檢查我們的課業。
examples.reason_cn: later 表示稍後會發生的事情。

examples.english: My family will have dim sum tomorrow morning.
examples.chinese: 我的家人明天早上會吃點心。
examples.reason_cn: will 後面使用動詞原形 have。

examples.english: The rain will stop soon.
examples.reason_cn: soon 表示事情很快會發生。

examples.english: I will not use the computer tonight.
examples.reason_cn: 否定句用 will not 加動詞原形 use。

examples.english: She will not be late tomorrow.
examples.reason_cn: 否定句用 will not 加動詞原形 be。

examples.english: We will not have PE next week.
examples.chinese: 我們下星期不會上體育課。
examples.reason_cn: 否定句用 will not 加動詞原形 have。

examples.english: Dad will not drive tomorrow morning.
examples.chinese: 爸爸明天早上不會駕車。
examples.reason_cn: 否定句用 will not 加動詞原形 drive。

examples.english: The shop will not open until next month.
examples.chinese: 那間商店要到下個月才會開門。
examples.reason_cn: next month 表示下個月的事情。

examples.english: Will you come to school tomorrow?
examples.reason_cn: 一般疑問句把 Will 放在主語前，come 使用原形。

examples.english: Will Amy join us later?
examples.chinese: Amy 稍後會加入我們嗎？
examples.reason_cn: 一般疑問句把 Will 放在主語前。

examples.english: Will they play in the match next week?
examples.chinese: 他們下星期會參加比賽嗎？
examples.reason_cn: Will 後面使用主語和動詞原形 play。

examples.english: What will you do tomorrow?
examples.reason_cn: 特殊疑問句用疑問詞、will、主語和動詞原形。

examples.english: When will the lesson start?
examples.reason_cn: Will 後面使用主語和動詞原形 start。

examples.english: I think our team will win tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我想我們的隊伍明天會勝出。
examples.reason_cn: will 可以表示對將來的預測。

examples.english: It will be sunny next week.
examples.reason_cn: will 可以表示對將來的預測。

examples.english: I will help you with your homework later.
examples.reason_cn: will 可以表示願意幫忙。

examples.english: We will carry the books for the teacher soon.
examples.chinese: 我們很快會替老師搬書。
examples.reason_cn: will 可以表示願意幫忙。

examples.english: My cousin will move to a new flat next month.
examples.chinese: 我的表親下個月會搬到新住所。
examples.reason_cn: next month 表示下個月會發生的事情。

optional_extension.title: Short Forms
optional_extension.explanation_en: We often use short forms when we speak or write informally.
optional_extension.explanation_zh: 說話或非正式寫作時，我們常使用縮寫。

examples.english: I will → I'll
She will → She'll
We will → We'll
will not → won't

practice.question: I ___ (visit) Grandma tomorrow.
She ___ (read) the book later.
We ___ (play) football next week.
Dad ___ (cook) dinner tomorrow.
The bus ___ (arrive) soon.
Mum ___ the shopping later.
They ___ a film tomorrow.
I ___ late tomorrow.
___ Amy come later?
Will Dad ___ the car next week?
Change to negative: He will play basketball tomorrow.
Change to negative: We will visit the museum next week.
Change to a question: Lily will clean her room later.
Change to a question: They will go home soon.
Put in order: tomorrow / will / I / my bike / ride
Put in order: next week / what / will / you / do / ?
Correct the sentence: She will goes to school tomorrow.
Correct the sentence: I will to watch TV later.
Correct the sentence: Will he plays football?
Translate into English: 我們下星期會去圖書館。

answer_key.answer: He will not play basketball tomorrow.
We will not visit the museum next week.
Will Lily clean her room later?
I will ride my bike tomorrow.
What will you do next week?
She will go to school tomorrow.
We will go to the library next week.
